summary: Made surgical seam edits to strengthen the handoff into chapter 14 by seeding the exact kitchen details Beni later recalls and by clarifying the timing of the remaining eighty-pound follow-up. The opening was left intact because it already differs structurally from the visible adjacent opening.
edits: Changed the kitchen kettle reference to a dented kettle so chapter 14's recall lands cleanly.
Added Eszter's hip-against-the-counter posture in the kitchen scene to match the next chapter's remembered image.
Adjusted the final money beat to point the remaining fifty toward the next day's eighty-pound handoff.
